title: callicarpa longibracteata
intro: Callicarpa longibracteata, also known as the large-bracted jabberberry or long-bract callicarpa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Callicarpa longibracteata include treating fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
